_comment: NPC: Zhao Xingsha (赵星煞). Canon ID: N140. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Zhao Xingsha

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Soul Transformation; rival to Wang Lin

note: Heavenly Fate Sect Soul Transformation disciple; rival

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
